title: L4 trust.auto_drop Payload
description: Auto-drop transition emitted by trust_record_override per FR-L4-3. Auto-drop ratchets tier DOWN per the configured auto_drop_on_override rule and starts the cooldown timer. The decision_id MUST reference an externally-knowable record (e.g., panel decision id) so the auditor can correlate.

to_tier.description: Tier resolved per the configured drop_to step (default: drop one rank toward default_tier).

decision_id.description: External record correlating this override (e.g., panel-decisions.jsonl id, PR number, audit-event id).

cooldown_until.description: ISO-8601 UTC; cooldown enforced until this time. Computed as ts_utc + cooldown_seconds.

cooldown_seconds.description: Effective cooldown window applied. Echoed for auditor convenience.
